description_long: This is a modern, compact rifle with a predominantly black and blue color scheme. The rifle features a collapsible stock at the rear, a detachable box magazine, and a short barrel with a flash hider at the muzzle. The handguard and receiver are accented in blue, contrasting with the black grip, stock, and magazine. Iron sights are mounted on the top rail, providing basic aiming capability. The overall design is tactical and ergonomic, suitable for urban environments and close-quarters use.
description: A compact, black and blue tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, detachable magazine, and iron sights. The design is modern and suited for urban scenarios.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle with flash hider and the narrow profile of the handguard.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, blue handguard, collapsible stock, and detachable magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock and the alignment of the iron sights along the top rail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blue handguard, black stock, and magazine, mirroring the details of view 1.
